stockgoblin.description: The stockgoblin will bring animals here to graze.

topic1.title: Description:
topic1.desc1: The Slopgoblin is the greatest chef known to the firefly tribes, and the chef specials are to die for!

topic2.title: What it does:
topic2.desc1: The job of the Slopgoblin is simple. Cook, cook, cook. Goblins need food to live, the same as any other culture, and especially a lot of food when laying eggs for babies. The Slopgoblin has it covered.

topic3.title: Chef Specials:
topic3.desc1: The culinary arts are not for the weak minded. Cooking takes brains and heart and the chef specials require both in abundance. Special recipes known only to goblin Slopgoblins, the chef specials are great for keeping a colony fed.

stockgoblin.title: Stockgoblin
stockgoblin.description1: He who grows herds, grows themselves.

topic1.title: Description:
topic1.desc1: Stockgoblins are farmers and herders. Masters of crop and beast.

topic2.title: What it does:
topic2.desc1: The Stockgoblin is a farmer, growing crops goblins would use. They also herd animals back to designated areas.

topic3.title: How to feed the animals:
topic3.desc1: Stockgoblins need special feed to keep their beasts alive. These feeds can be crafted by the Slopgoblin.

pasture.frog_pasture_description: A field of frogs kept by a Stockgoblin. They will randomly generate bug meat fir the stockgoblin to harvest.
pasture.ostrich_pasture_description: Big birds called Ostriches will be brought here by the stockgoblin where they can lay their giant eggs.
pasture.wolf_pasture_description: Baby wolves found in the wilderness will be cared for and looked after here.
pasture.spider_pasture_description: A nest of spiders the stockgoblin has found and brought back to care for.

herb_bin_ghost.description: An aromatic jar for holding fresh herbs.

wolf.description: A trained wolf of the Firefly clan, raised from a pup.

young.description: A baby wolf, who was found alone in the wilderness.

glowing_mushrooms_ghost.description: The perfect decoration for any goblin garden.

cattail.description: This almost beats the swamp they're used to growing in!

giple.description: A pretty flower. Too pretty for such a plant pot.

sapling.description: A lovely sapling, planted in a dirty cauldron.

knife_board.description: I would say it is the perfect place to hang your knives, but someone already did...

cattail_flour.description: Gritty and poorly ground, but it'll do.

mushroom_grog.description: An alcoholic beverage of fermented mushrooms.

seed_porridge.description: A thick, creamy soup, made from the seeds of the swampy plants.

stuffed_bug_roast.description: Fresh bug meat, stuffed with mushroom and herbs.

candied_mushrooms.description: A sugary treat made from colorful sugars.

sandy_witch.description: The humans call it food, but I thought witches were people?

frog_feed.description: A bag of ground up bugs, perfect for spiders and frogs.

frog_feed_ground.description: scattered bug chunks for frogs and spiders to eat!.

ostrich_feed.description: Chunks of seed and veges for ostriches.

ostrich_feed_ground.description: scattered seed and vegetable chunks for ostriches.

wolf_feed.description: Larger chunks of meat, roughly chopped for your wolves.

wolf_feed_ground.description: Larger chunks of meat, roughly chopped for your wolves.

mushroom_bed_pet.description: A sleepspot fit for a beast king

spidersilk.description: A wooden roll of silk harvested from tamed spiders.

mushroom_bed_pet_recipe.description: A shroomy patch for your pets to lay their heads.
mushroom_bed_pet_recipe.flavor: Just... don't let them eat it...

stockgoblin_description.description: The Stockgoblin looks after critters and crops.

level_1_data.perk_000_description: The stockgoblin can grow a number of easy crops, good for food.
level_1_data.perk_001_description: The stockgoblin can herd animals for resources and food.

level_2_data.perk_000_description: Gotta go fast! The stockgoblin can move faster now.
level_2_data.perk_001_description: The stockgoblin has sourced a wider variety of animal pheremones to attract different animals.

level_3_data.perk_000_description: Always being too busy to talk to friends, the stockgoblin instead learned to enjoy hanging out with their beasts.

level_5_data.perk_000_description: The stockgoblin can perform amazing acts of arboreal advancement! (They can grow trees.)

stockgoblin_crook_iconic.description: A solid wooden crook, made with strong wood.

stockgoblin_crook_talisman.description: A solid wooden crook, made with strong wood.

firemaster_description.description: The Slopgoblin makes delicious, hearty meals from base vegetables and meats.

workshop.name: Stone Cauldron
workshop.long_description: Humongous, heavy pot, suitable for slopgoblining up a feast at a time!

level_1_data.perk_000_description: The slopgoblin can make basic, nutritious recipes.

level_2_data.perk_000_description: Through experimentation, the slopgoblin has discovered certain things that work well for making other foods.
level_2_data.perk_001_description: The slopgoblin has a basic understanding of using fish and other sea life in their meals.

level_4_data.perk_000_description: If the humans can craft food that is 'sweet', then why can't we?

level_5_data.perk_000_description: The slopgoblin has heard of, and mastered unique cuisines from the worlds of goblin, and man.

firemaster_spoon_iconic.description: A spoon made of wood, to absorb all those natural flavors. You'll be tasting last weeks stew until next year!

firemaster_spoon_talisman.description: A spoon made of wood, to absorb all those natural flavors. You'll be tasting last weeks stew until next year!

firemaster_workbench_ghost.description: Used by the Slopgoblin for delicious recipes.

firemaster_prep_table_ghost.description: The perfect surface to get dishes ready.

firemaster_workbench_recipe.flavor: Stone, to keep the food hot for a long time.

firemaster_prep_table_recipe.description: The perfect surface to get dishes ready.

firemaster_oven_recipe.description: A fine stone oven for baking and grilling.

mushroom_bin_recipe.description: A hollowed out mushroom. Perfect for storing all kinds of foods.
mushroom_bin_recipe.flavor: free lid included with every craft!

herb_bin_recipe.description: Great for holding all your kitchen herbs.

cook_pot_cattail_recipe.description: A good use for a dirty old cauldron.

cook_pot_sapling_recipe.description: All that extra nutrients from the leftover food in the cauldron might help it grow.

glowing_mushrooms_recipe.description: No, you're not just seeing things.

knife_board_recipe.description: The prized tools of any Slopgoblin.

cattail_flour_recipe.description: Gritty and made from the ground rhizomes of the cattail plant, this flour isn't ideal for a hearthling diet... but a goblin diet...?.

goblin_loaf_recipe.description: A gritty loaf of bread, perfect for goblins.

candied_mushrooms_recipe.description: A delicious treat, making something sweet.

mushroom_grog_recipe.description: An alcoholic beverage known to the Firefly clan, brewed from fermented mushrooms that typically grow in the swamps.

sandy_witch_recipe.description: The humans eat them, so we can, too!

frog_feed_recipe.description: Chopped up insect chunks for your frogs and spiders delight.

ostrich_feed_recipe.description: Chunks of seed and veges for ostriches.

wolf_feed_recipe.description: Larger chunks of meat, roughly chopped for your wolves.
